MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-619680, CGC-25-621457 WITH CASE CGC-24-614344
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-619680, CGC-25-621457 WITH CASE CGC-24-614344.

Plaintiff Ema Bell's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-619680, CGC-25-621457 WITH CASE CGC-24-614344 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court orders the three captioned cases consolidated and grants Moving Plaintiff's request for leave to file a consolidated complaint. CGC-24-614344 shall be the lead case. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. Moving Plaintiff must file his consolidated complaint, substantially identical to the attachment to the stipulation forthwith but no later than December 9, 2025.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
